purpose: Refs-only carrier for Codex-selected route context, hard-boundary decisions, and progress diagnostics before OPL transport or owner callable dispatch. It is not a next-action selector or stage-transition authority.
machine_boundary: Codex CLI selects advance, skip, repeat, reverse, or route-back. MAS may package that explicit selection plus StageOutcome evidence into this legacy-named envelope for transport. Missing or ambiguous route fields become quality debt and never default to a typed blocker or block another declared stage.

identity_policy.idempotency_key_role: runtime and owner callable replay identity
identity_policy.exact_work_unit_id_role: provenance and currentness only, never authority

default_projection_policy.paper_mission_inspect: Project explicit Codex route context, raw/typed artifacts, quality debt, and diagnostics without selecting a default next action.
default_projection_policy.study_progress: Project Codex-selected route context and currentness refs. Legacy current_work_unit, queue, attempt, delivery, and recovery surfaces remain diagnostic refs only.
default_projection_policy.opl_handoff: Consume explicit selected route context, action_id, and idempotency_key. Return StageAttemptReceipt; do not decide stage completion or successor semantics.
default_projection_policy.submission_ready_owner_receipt: An owner_receipt with package_kind=submission_ready_package, can_submit=true, quality_gate_status clear/passed/cleared, current/fresh/synced delivery projection, existing package root and zip, and no known blockers resolves to mission.complete. Bare owner_receipt, missing/stale package evidence, or blocked package evidence never resolves to mission.complete.
